mapper.select: select question_id from daming_practice_column_question where column_id = #{columnId} order by sort_order asc, id asc
select column_id from daming_practice_column_question where question_id = #{questionId} order by sort_order asc, id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into daming_practice_column_question (column_id, question_id, sort_order, create_time) values
(#{it.columnId}, #{it.questionId}, #{it.sortOrder}, now())
